description: Sequential creative flow: pick a theme, brainstorm imagery and emotions in parallel, then write the poem and title it.

nodes.prompt: Pick one specific evocative theme for a short poem in 5 words or fewer. Reply with just the theme, no preamble.

Generate 5 vivid visual images relating to this theme. Bullet form, no preamble.

Theme: {{theme.result}}

List 3 emotional notes that fit this theme. Bullet form, no preamble.

Theme: {{theme.result}}
